languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, прошу простить меня, но дело не терпит отлагательств. Мастер Двигателя Зи-Ра Таллар молит вас спуститься в Сектор Бионика при первой возможности — древнейший археотех, священный имплантационный трон находится под угрозой гибели".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, прошу простить меня, но дело не терпит отлагательств. Мастер Двигателя Зи-Ра Таллар молит вас спуститься в Сектор Бионика при первой возможности — древнейший археотех, священный имплантационный трон находится под угрозой гибели".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

languages.text: “大人，请恕我直言，这事耽搁不得。驱动大师扎拉·塔拉恳请您尽早移步仿生区。那件古老的远古科技，即神圣的移植王座，正面临彻底毁灭的风险。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

traits.locale_text: “大人，请恕我直言，这事耽搁不得。驱动大师扎拉·塔拉恳请您尽早移步仿生区。那件古老的远古科技，即神圣的移植王座，正面临彻底毁灭的风险。”

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, le ruego que me perdone, pero esto no puede esperar. La maestra de motores Zi-Ra Tallar le suplica que acuda al Sector Bionica en cuanto le sea posible. La antigua arqueotecnología del sagrado trono de implantación corre el riesgo de perderse para siempre».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, le ruego que me perdone, pero esto no puede esperar. La maestra de motores Zi-Ra Tallar le suplica que acuda al Sector Bionica en cuanto le sea posible. La antigua arqueotecnología del sagrado trono de implantación corre el riesgo de perderse para siempre».

languages.text: « Mille excuses, Votre Seigneurie, mais la question ne peut pas attendre. La maîtresse des machines Zi-Ra Tallar souhaite que vous la retrouviez au secteur Bionica dès que possible. L'archéotechnologie du fauteuil d'implantation sacré risque d'être perdue à jamais. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

traits.locale_text: « Mille excuses, Votre Seigneurie, mais la question ne peut pas attendre. La maîtresse des machines Zi-Ra Tallar souhaite que vous la retrouviez au secteur Bionica dès que possible. L'archéotechnologie du fauteuil d'implantation sacré risque d'être perdue à jamais. »

languages.text: "Ich bitte um Verzeihung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber diese Angelegenheit kann nicht warten. Triebwerksmeisterin Zi-Ra Tallar ersucht Euch, baldmöglichst in den Sektor Bionica zu kommen. Die alte Archäotech, der heilige Implantationsthron, läuft Gefahr, für immer verloren zu gehen."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bitte um Verzeihung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber diese Angelegenheit kann nicht warten. Triebwerksmeisterin Zi-Ra Tallar ersucht Euch, baldmöglichst in den Sektor Bionica zu kommen. Die alte Archäotech, der heilige Implantationsthron, läuft Gefahr, für immer verloren zu gehen."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, affınıza sığınıyorum ama bu bekleyemez. Motor Üstadı Zi-Ra Tallar, en kısa sürede Sektör Biyonika'yı ziyaret etmeniz için yalvarıyor. Kadim arkeotek, yani kutsal implantasyon tahtı sonsuza dek kaybedilme riskiyle karşı karşıya."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, affınıza sığınıyorum ama bu bekleyemez. Motor Üstadı Zi-Ra Tallar, en kısa sürede Sektör Biyonika'yı ziyaret etmeniz için yalvarıyor. Kadim arkeotek, yani kutsal implantasyon tahtı sonsuza dek kaybedilme riskiyle karşı karşıya."

languages.text: 「御{mf|殿|殿}|御{mf|様|様}、失礼いたしますが、これは待てません。ドライブマスターのジ・ラ・タルラが、貴殿に最速でセクター・ビオニカへお越し頂きたいと、懇願しております。古代のアーケオテクノロジー、聖なるインプラント・スツールが、永遠に失われる危機に瀕しております。」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I beg your pardon, but this cannot wait. Drivesmaster Zi-Ra Tallar entreats you to visit the Sector Bionica at your earliest convenience. The ancient archeotech, the sacred implantation throne, is at risk of being lost forever."

traits.locale_text: 「御{mf|殿|殿}|御{mf|様|様}、失礼いたしますが、これは待てません。ドライブマスターのジ・ラ・タルラが、貴殿に最速でセクター・ビオニカへお越し頂きたいと、懇願しております。古代のアーケオテクノロジー、聖なるインプラント・スツールが、永遠に失われる危機に瀕しております。」
